Results.PublicRemarks: Come view this Victorian Style Home that has five bedrooms, and mostly hardwood floors on the main floor, upstairs and basement. This home has lots of  space inside and out with many mature trees and bushes, but still plenty of room to construct a green house or gazebo. Fantastic location close to downtown, two minute drive to the Village Mall and ten minutes to the Avalon Mall, Bowering  Park and all amenities. (22198166)

Results.PublicRemarks: Executive style, 2 story home located on a nice cul de sac in a sought after area of Bay Roberts. This property features a half acre landscaped lot with mature trees, professionally designed rock wall, flowers galore and large brick driveway. Inside, the main floor has a beautiful sunken living room with propane fireplace, kitchen with custom oak cabinets and dining nook, formal dining room, office, large front foyer with water feature, laundry room, 2 piece bath and an awesome custom wet bar with all the bells and whistles. Head up the winding oak staircase to the second floor and you'll find 3 spacious spare bedrooms, 3 piece main bathroom and large master bedroom with 3 piece ensuite and ample closet space. Other great features of this home include lots of custom wood work and a convenient attached garage. (22169073)

Results.PublicRemarks: Now offered for sale, this immaculate & spacious 3+1 bedroom home in the desirable Smallwood Drive area of Port aux Basques. This home boasts quality craftsmanship with ceramics & hardwoods, Spanish ceilings, crown mouldings, an ensuite with heated floors and surround sound & walk-in closet in the master bedroom, and much more.  It has plenty of space for the growing family as well as two, yes two, attached garages just in case one wasn't enough for all of your toys.  Enjoy an amazing view of the town of Port aux Basques to the south, and the Gulf of St. Lawrence to the South-west. This growing neighbourhood is also family oriented & has newly developed playgrounds & scenic walking trails for family recreation. There is also easy access to the trailway & back-country for those who enjoy ski-doo & atv adventures.This home is a bargain as you would not be able to build this home at this price with today's rates. (21696558)

Results.PublicRemarks: Beautiful Family Home! This 3,100 square foot 3 bedroom, 2 bath, open-concept design boasts an ocean view.  The large kitchen shouts elegance from the dark-stained cabinetry with center island to the well-lighted walk-in pantry. The master suite boasts an ensuite with jaccuzi, plus a large walk-in closet. The unfinished basement with separate entrance awaits your creativity. Outdoors are a front and back deck, level and landscaped lot plus an attached garage. Located on a popular, family-friendly street just minutes to the amenities in Bay Roberts, this homes craftsmanship is top-notch starting from the professional design with thoughtfully planned lay-out, flow and attention to detail including hardwood and ceramic flooring. Atlantic Home Warranty in place.  This wonderful home could be yours! (21675200)

With beautiful curb appeal, and located in the middle of everything you could need, this home has an inlaw apartment which can help with the mortgage, house an adult child or parent, or even provide some extra income to pay for a new toy! With many upgrades in recent years such as doors, siding, flooring and more this home is ready for the new owner to move right in.  The main unit has 3 bedrooms and a great deck with a panoramic view. The two bedroom apartment is very easy to rent and has its own entrance from the outside. (21628393)

Results.PublicRemarks: Perfectly located in Mount Pearl, this 2-storey home waiting for you! Boasting 4 spacious bedrooms and 1 full bath and 2 half baths, ideal for a growing family! Walk into a large foyer, with modern French doors, leading into the large living-room, fireplace and all! Country kitchen with cherry oak cabinetry, patio doors off the dinette area that leads to a deck and a storage shed. Basement is finished, with laundry room, spacious rec room with a bar and an abundance of storage. This home has been well maintained and has seen many upgrades in recent years. Including: near heaters, trim, hardwood floors, light fixtures, and a new surround tub & vanity. Store all your gadgets and vehicles with ease in the large attached garage. (21405120)

Results.PublicRemarks: Welcome to 37 Lasalle Drive, an affordable 2 storey priced at only $329,900. Quality built by Cardinal Homes Limited, a company in business for over 30 years and known for their outstanding customer satisfaction. Situated in an excellent location, beautiful Pearlview Subdivision, which is located off of Mount Carson Avenue and only minutes to either the city of paradise or St.John's. This open concept 3 bedroom home offers lots of room for your growing family. The kitchen has an island, is spacious and features lots of cabinetry. There is also a main floor Laundry, which is super convenient. The basement is fully insulated and is roughed in for a future bathroom. This home comes fully landscaped with a 2 car driveway, has rear yard access, and an 10x12 pressure treated patio. Property is backed by a 7 year Atlantic New Home Warranty Program. (21114739)

Results.PublicRemarks: This new custom built Cardinal Home on Lasalle Drive is selling for only $329,900. The open concept main floor is great for entertaining and family use. The gorgeous kitchen is spacious and features a eating area bay window, plenty of cabinetry and an island for extra storage and counter space. The half bath, back porch and laundry complete the main level. Upstairs you will find 3 bedrooms including the master which boasts an ensuite and walk-in closet. The basement is fully insulated and is roughed-in for a future bathroom. There is also crown moldings and victorian headers in the main area. This home comes fully landscaped with a 2 car paved driveway with rear yard access and has a 10X12 pressure treated rear patio, plus front veranda. There is still time to customize and pick out your own finishes. Property is backed by a 7 year Atlantic New Home Warranty Program. (21114725)

Results.PublicRemarks: An ocean view, 172 years of history & modern conveniences packaged into one! 31 Harbour Dr, The Ships Husband, has all of that, and more! With 3 fully developed levels youll not be lacking space. 4 bedrooms & 2 full baths make it perfect for you, for visiting family & friends or as a guest rental! Built in 1846 by Captain George Spracklin, youll be amazed at how it has been renovated & maintained: vinyl siding, windows & a newly shingled roof. Old hardwood, wooden stairs & some new flooring mix comfort & charm. Wander to the 3rd level & imagine how you would use this space. It will be sure to create conversation.  Add to that, a lovely fenced yard, lots of shrubbery, a 2 storey garage, a sheltered BBQ deck, & a front verandah to soak in the views of the bay! Join others from all over the world as you enjoy the quaint charm of Brigus, its famous Blueberry Festival and its air of by-gone days! Bring your boat & an appetite for culture! You may have just found your happy place! (20963346)

Address.AddressText: 81 Kenmount Rd.|St. John's, Newfoundland & Labrador A1B4J8
31 Harbour Drive|Brigus, Newfoundland & Labrador A0A1K0
